gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the app metrics and checking on the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and README up-to-date with the latest community usage data.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about automated metrics and health checks for the 'greenhouse' (apps). Visual: The robot monitor checking on pixel code-plants in a greenhouse, with Polly the bee helping out.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat waters a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat waters a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
